name: Hot Horseradish Mustard
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the dry mustard, mustard seeds, cider vinegar, white wine vinegar, honey, prepared horseradish (drained), and red pepper flakes in a blender.
2. Whirl the ingredients until they are smooth and well combined.
3. Transfer the mixture to an airtight container and store it in the refrigerator for several months.
